content.body:
The phrase "Leo decides the how" was causing Leo to execute work
directly instead of delegating. Updated all 4 occurrences to the
correct chain: founder=what+why, Leo=who (routing), Managers=how
(execution strategy).

Files: leo.md, README.md, project.md, rdd.md (table split into
tactical-routing and tactical-execution rows)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: fix(core): clarify responsibility chain — Leo=who, Managers=how
